name: Agent Warden Agents View
description: OpenClaw plugin that emits OTel GenAI Semantic Convention spans for Azure Monitor Agents View.

otelEndpoint.description: OTel Collector gRPC endpoint for trace export

enableContentCapture.description: Capture prompt/completion content in spans (PII-sensitive, off by default)

serviceName.description: OTel service name for resource attributes

tenantId.description: Tenant ID for multi-tenant filtering in App Insights
